plain_language.en: Short checkup (Level 2) for a new patient
plain_language.es: Chequeo médico corto (Nivel 2) para paciente nuevo
plain_language.fr: Consultation médicale courte (Niveau 2) pour nouveau patient
plain_language.hi: नए मरीज के लिए छोटी जांच (स्तर 2)
plain_language.zh: 首诊新患者的简短医疗评估（二级）
plain_language.pt: Check-up médico curto (Nível 2) para paciente novo

notes: New patient office visit, 20 minutes, straightforward clinical decision making.
